classes.description: Override or extend the styles applied to the component.

className.description: A CSS class name applied to the root element.

onAreaClick.description: Callback fired when an area is clicked.

event.name: event
event.description: The event source of the callback.

onMarkClick.description: Callback fired when a mark is clicked.

event.name: event
event.description: The event source of the callback.

seriesId.description: The id of the series to display. If undefined all series are displayed.
